title: 五角星
description:
用Turtle画一个五角星
（必须用turtle引擎）
starterCode:
import turtle

turtle.speed(3)
turtle.color("red")
turtle.begin_fill()
for i in range(5):
    turtle.forward(200)
    turtle.right(144)
turtle.end_fill()
solution:
import turtle

turtle.speed(3)
turtle.color("red")
turtle.begin_fill()
for i in range(5):
    turtle.forward(300)
    turtle.right(144)
turtle.end_fill()
author: teacher
